taṃ smā rathaṃ maghavan prāva sātaye
vayaṃ jayema tvayā yujā vṛtam (AVP. jayema tvāyujā bhṛtaḥ)
asmabhyam indra varivaḥ (AVŚ. varīyaḥ) sugaṃ kṛdhi
full_citation: RV.1.102.4c; AVŚ.7.50.4c; AVP.3.36.5c. Cf. asmabhyaṃ mahi

pratika: nānā hi tvā havamānā janā ime

akalpa indraḥ pratimānam ojasā (AVP. indro’pratimānam ojaḥ)
ut te śatān maghavann uc ca bhūyasaḥ

full_citation: RV.1.102.10c. See ugraṃ cit tvām avase
RV.1.102.10d. Cf. sa tvaṃ na indra havaneṣu

pratika: yad dha sūnuḥ śravase nāma dadhe

full_citation: RV.1.103.5a. P: tad asyedaṃ paśyata ŚŚ.9.17.3

pratika: sa gā avindat so avindad aśvān

anu tvā patnīr hṛṣitaṃ vayaś ca

tam ā ni ṣīda svāno nārvā
o tye nara indram ūtaye guḥ
nū cit tān sadyo adhvano jagamyāt
te na ā vakṣan suvitāya varṇam
adha smā no maghavañ carkṛtād it
mā no magheva niṣṣapī parā dāḥ
sa tvaṃ na indra sūrye so apsu
adhā manye śrat te asmā adhāyi
mā no vadhīr indra mā parā dāḥ
mā naḥ priyā bhojanāni pra moṣīḥ
āṇḍā mā no maghavañ chakra nir bhet

pratika: kas tad bibharti nūtano vi vocati

śaṃ yor yat te manurhitaṃ tad īmahe

devair no devy aditir ni pātu

vi hy akhyaṃ manasā vasya ichan

full_citation: RV.1.109.2c; TS.1.1.14.1c; N.6.9c. See adhā etc

pratika: yebhiḥ sapitvaṃ pitaro na āyan (RV. āsan)

svāhākṛtasya sam u tṛpṇuta ṛbhavaḥ (TB. tṛṇṇutarbhavaḥ; ApŚ. tṛpṇutarbhavaḥ)
apākāḥ prāñco mama ke cid āpayaḥ
ṛbhumāṃ indra citram ā darśi rādhaḥ
ā no yajñāya takṣata ṛbhumad vayaḥ
tan naḥ śardhāya dhāsathā sv indriyam
sātiṃ no jaitrīṃ saṃ maheta viśvahā
te no hinvantu sātaye dhiye jiṣe
tābhir ū ṣu ūtibhir aśvinā gatam
ratham ā tasthur vacasaṃ na mantave
agnir nādīdec cita iddho ajmann ā
ā gha vā yābhir aruṇīr aśikṣatam
pra turvītiṃ pra ca dabhītim āvatam

o te yanti ye aparīṣu paśyān
atho vy uchād uttarāṃ anu dyūn
ud īrdhvaṃ jīvo asur na āgāt

āre asmad daivyaṃ (KS.ApŚ. amatiṃ) heḍo asyatu
mā no mahāntam uta mā no arbhakam
mā na ukṣantam uta mā na ukṣitam

pratika: adhā ca naḥ śarma yacha dvibarhāḥ
sūrya ātmā jagatas tasthuṣaś ca (JG. adds svāhā)
maryo na yoṣām abhy eti paścāt (MS. paścā)
sūryo rūpaṃ kṛṇute dyor (MS. dyaur) upasthe
nir aṃhasaḥ pipṛtā (TB. pipṛtān) nir avadyāt
rayiṃ na kaś cin mamṛvāṃ avāhāḥ
tad vāṃ dātraṃ mahi kīrtenyaṃ bhūt
paidvo vājī sadam id dhavyo aryaḥ
tad vāṃ narā śaṃsyaṃ rādhyaṃ ca
tad vāṃ narā sanaye daṃsa ugram
dadhyaṅ ha yan madhv ātharvaṇo vām
aśvasya śīrṣṇā pra yad īm uvāca

kim aṅga vāṃ praty avartiṃ gamiṣṭhā
ā vāṃ rathaṃ yuvatis tiṣṭhad atra
tā vāṃ narā sv avase sujātā

pratika: adhāyi śasman sam ayanta ā diśaḥ

rathaṃ na dasrā karaṇā sam invathaḥ
pra vām atra vidhate daṃsanā bhuvat
svarvatīr ita ūtīr (read itaūtīr) yuvor aha
athā śiraḥ prati vām aśvyaṃ vadat
tā no vidvāṃsā manma vocetam adya
pātaṃ ca sahyaso yuvaṃ ca rabhyaso naḥ
pra yā ghoṣe bhṛgavāṇe na śobhe

yad dha prabhāsi kṛtvyāṃ anu dyūn
aṣṭā maho diva ādo harī iha
hariṃ yat te mandinaṃ dukṣan vṛdhe
tvam indra naryo yāṃ avo nṝn
yaṃ te kāvya uśanā mandinaṃ dāt

ā no bhaja maghavan goṣv aryaḥ

pratika: paścā sa daghyā yo aghasya dhātā

na tat te anyā uṣaso naśanta
parā ca yanti punar ā ca yanti
uṣo no adya suhavā vy ucha
devo no atra savitā nv artham
vi nūnam uchād asati pra ketuḥ
ut te vayaś cid vasater apaptan
yaḥ pṛṇāti sa ha deveṣu gachati
anyas teṣāṃ paridhir astu kaś cit
pūrvām anu prayatim ā dade vaḥ
sa hi purū (SV. puru) cid ojasā virukmatā
dṛḍhā cid asmā anu dur yathā vide
sthirā cid annā ni riṇāty ojasā
sa hi śardho na mārutaṃ tuviṣvaṇiḥ

agner aveṇa (read agne raveṇa) marutāṃ na bhojyā

dasmo hi ṣmā vṛṣaṇaṃ pinvasi tvacam

nahi tvā śatru starate stṛṇoṣi yam
havyo na ya iṣavān manma rejati
ugraṃ cit tvā mahimā sakṣad avase

pratika: adhā hi tvā janitā jījanad vaso

full_citation: RV.1.130.1a; SV.1.459a; AB.5.13.1; KB.23.7; AA.5.1.1.7. Ps: endra yāhy upa naḥ AŚ.8.1.17; endra yāhy upa ŚŚ.10.8.9

nū itthā te pūrvathā ca pravācyam

pratika: yo naḥ pṛtanyād apa taṃ-tam id dhatam

ā vāṃ ratho niyutvān vakṣad avase

ime ye te su vāyo bāhvojasaḥ

full_citation: RV.1.137.1g; 9.64.28c; SV.2.4c; JB.1.93; 3.35; PB.6.9.25; LŚ.7.12.9. P: somāḥ śukrāḥ LŚ.7.12.12. Fragment: somāś śukrāḥ JB.1.317

asyā ū ṣu ṇa upa sātaye bhuvaḥ
astu śrauṣaṭ puro agniṃ dhiyā dadhe
full_citation: RV.1.139.1a; SV.1.461a. P: astu śrauṣaṭ AB.5.12.5; AŚ.8.1.12. Cf. BṛhD.4.7

pratika: ā nu tac (SV. tyac) chardho divyaṃ vṛṇīmahe
adha pra sū na upa yantu (SV. pra nūnam upa yanti) dhītayaḥ
yad dha tyan mitrāvaruṇāv ṛtād adhi
aceti dasrā vy u nākam ṛṇvathaḥ
mā vāṃ rātir upa dasat kadā cana
o ṣū ṇo agne śṛṇuhi tvam īḍitaḥ
vi tāṃ duhre aryamā kartarī sacā
mo ṣu vo asmad abhi tāni pauṃsyā
full_citation: RV.1.139.8a; AVŚ.20.67.2a; AŚ.8.1.2. P: mo ṣu vo asmat ŚŚ.10.7.7

pratika: asmāsu tan maruto yac ca duṣṭaram
dadhyaṅ ha me januṣaṃ pūrvo aṅgirāḥ
full_citation: RV.1.139.9a; AŚ.8.1.2. P: dadhyaṅ ha ŚŚ.10.7.7. Cf. BṛhD.4.10

pratika: teṣāṃ padena mahy ā name girā

full_citation: RV.1.139.11a; VS.7.19a; AB.5.12.5; ŚB.4.2.2.9a; AŚ.8.1.12. Ps: ye devāso divi Rvidh.1.25.3; ye devāsaḥ VS.33.47; KŚ.9.6.15; ŚG.2.14.16; VHDh.8.71. See ye devā divy

pratika: te devāso (TS. devā) yajñam imaṃ juṣadhvam (AVŚ. juṣantām)
dhāsim iva pra bharā yonim agnaye
yat sīṃ mahīm avaniṃ prābhi marmṛśat
jānann eva jānatīr nitya ā śaye
tam agruvaḥ keśinīḥ saṃ hi rebhire
priyād u cin manmanaḥ preyo astu te
yat te śukraṃ tanvo rocate śuci
janāṃś ca yā pārayāc charma yā ca
abhī no agna uktham ij juguryāḥ
baḍ (ŚŚ. bal) itthā tad vapuṣe dhāyi darśatam
yad īm upa hvarate sādhate matiḥ
pṛkṣo vapuḥ pitumān nitya ā śaye
nir yad īṃ budhnān mahiṣasya varpasaḥ
yad īm anu pradivo madhva ādhave
pra yat pituḥ paramān nīyate pari
ubhā yad asya januṣaṃ yad invata
ād id yaviṣṭho abhavad ghṛṇā śuciḥ
ād in mātṝr āviśad yāsv ā śuciḥ
ād asya te kṛṣṇāso dakṣi sūrayaḥ
yat sīm anu kratunā viśvathā vibhuḥ
taṃ tvā nu navyaṃ sahaso yuvan vayam
raśmīṃr iva yo yamati janmanī ubhe
devānāṃ śaṃsam ṛta ā ca sukratuḥ
amī ca ye maghavāno vayaṃ ca
full_citation: RV.1.141.13c; KS.7.12c; ApŚ.5.9.10c. See amī ye magha°

pratika: mihaṃ na sūro ati niṣ ṭatanyuḥ
tantuṃ tanuṣva pūrvyam (RV.8.13.14c, pūrvyaṃ yathā vide)

full_citation: RV.1.142.3a; 9.24.6c; SV.2.316c. Cf. prec. but one
RV.1.142.7d. Cf. ā barhiḥ sīdataṃ sumat

pratika: tan nas turīpam adbhutam (AVŚ.AVP.KS. adbhutaṃ purukṣu)

full_citation: RV.1.143.1a; AB.4.30.14; KB.22.1. Ps: pra tavyasīṃ navyasīm AŚ.5.20.6; pra tavyasīm ŚŚ.8.6.6

pratika: apāṃ napād yo vasubhiḥ saha priyaḥ

full_citation: RV.1.143.4a. P: yam erire bhṛgavaḥ N.4.23

pratika: agniṃ taṃ gīrbhir hinuhi sva ā dame
ya eko vasvo varuṇo na rājati
na yo varāya marutām iva svanaḥ
yodho na śatrūn sa vanā ny ṛñjate
kuvin no agnir ucathasya vīr asat
ghṛtapratīkaṃ va (TB. ca) ṛtasya dhūrṣadam (TB. dhūruṣadam)
śukravarṇām ud u no yaṃsate dhiyam
eti pra hotā vratam asya māyayā
yā asya dhāma prathamaṃ ha niṃsate

agne juṣasva prati harya tad vacaḥ

sa cikitvāṃ īyate sā nv īyate

agne bhrātar druṇa id bhūtim ūdima

uta syā vāṃ ruśato vapsaso gīḥ
abhūd idaṃ vayunam o ṣu bhūṣatā
kim atra dasrā kṛṇuthaḥ kim āsāthe
jano yaḥ kaś cid ahavir mahīyate
kaḥ svid vṛkṣo niṣṭhito madhye arṇasaḥ
tad vāṃ narā nāsatyāv anu ṣyāt
suvṛd ratho vartate yann abhi kṣām
ā tiṣṭhataṃ suvṛtaṃ yo ratho vām
mā vāṃ vṛko mā vṛkīr ā dadharṣīt
mā pari varktam uta māti dhaktam
ayaṃ vāṃ bhāgo nihita iyaṃ gīḥ
tā vām adya tāv aparaṃ huvema
asme sā vāṃ mādhvī rātir astu
kathā jāte kavayaḥ ko vi veda
viśvaṃ tmanā bibhṛto yad dha nāma

pratika: yas tubhyaṃ dāśān na tam aṃho aśnavat
na tam aṃho na duritaṃ kutaś cana
viśvā id asmād dhvaraso vi bādhase
bṛhaspate yo no abhi hvaro dadhe
uta vā yo no marcayād anāgasaḥ
mā durevā uttaraṃ sumnam un naśan
yā no dūre taḍito yā arātayaḥ
mā no duḥśaṃso abhidipsur (KS. aghaśaṃsa) īśata
bṛhaspate mā praṇak tasya no vadhaḥ
āvis tat kṛṣva yad asat ta ukthyam
yad dīdayac (MS. °yañ) chavasa (TS. chavasā; MS. śavasa) ṛtaprajāta (KS. chavasarta°)
mā na stenebhyo ye abhi druhas pade
ā devānām ohate vi vrayo hṛdi
viśvaṃ tad bhadraṃ yad avanti devāḥ
yathā no mīḍhvān stavate sakhā tava
ud gā ājad abhinad brahmaṇā valam
sanā tā kā cid bhuvanā bhavītvā
yata u āyan tad ud īyur āviśam
āta ā tasthuḥ kavayo mahas pathaḥ
nakiḥ ṣo asty araṇo jahur hi tam
yatra vaṣṭi pra tad aśnoti dhanvanā
sa suṣṭutaḥ sa yudhi brahmaṇas patiḥ
cākṣmo yad vājaṃ bharate matī dhanā
ād it sūryas tapati tapyatur vṛthā
sa devo devān prati paprathe pṛthu
viśved u tā paribhūr brahmaṇas patiḥ
āpaś cana pra minanti vrataṃ vām
yo gā udājat sa dive vi cābhajat
vīreṣu vīrāṃ (MS. °raṃ) upa pṛṅdhi nas tvam
yad īśāno brahmaṇā veṣi me havam
jātena jātam ati sa pra sarsṛte (TB. ati sṛt pra sṛṃsate)
tokaṃ ca tasya tanayaṃ ca vardhate
sa ij janena sa viśā sa janmanā
sa putrair vājaṃ bharate dhanā nṛbhiḥ
pra taṃ prācā nayati brahmaṇas patiḥ
śṛṇotu mitro aryamā bhago naḥ (KS. me)
yad aryaman bhaya ā cin mayobhu
sugo hi vo aryaman mitra panthāḥ
tisro bhūmīr dhārayan (MS. °yaṃs) trīṃr (MS. trīnr) uta dyūn
ye ca devā asura ye ca martāḥ
na dakṣiṇā vi cikite na savyā
nakiṣ ṭaṃ ghnanty antito na dūrāt
yad vo vayaṃ cakṛmā kac cid āgaḥ
full_citation: RV.2.27.14b. Cf. devān vā yac, and under acittibhiś

pratika: mā no dīrghā abhi naśan tamisrāḥ

full_citation: RV.2.28.4a. P: pra sīm ādityo asṛjat N.1.7

pratika: na śrāmyanti na vi muñcanty ete
vi mac chrathāya (MS. mañ śrathāya) raśanām ivāgaḥ
mā tantuś chedi vayato dhiyaṃ me
mā mātrā śāry apasaḥ pura ṛtoḥ
apo su (MS. ṣu) myakṣa varuṇa bhiyasaṃ mat
mā no vadhair varuṇa ye ta iṣṭau
vi ṣū mṛdhaḥ śiśratho jīvase naḥ
tve hi kaṃ parvate na śritāni
ā no jīvān varuṇa tāsu śādhi
yo me rājan yujyo vā sakhā vā
steno vā yo dipsati no vṛko vā
haye devā yūyam id āpaya stha
mā vo ratho madhyamavāḍ ṛte bhūt
pra va (MS. vā) eko mimaya bhūry āgaḥ
mā mādhi putre vim iva grabhīṣṭa
pra hi kratuṃ vṛhatho yaṃ vanuthaḥ
na mā taman na śraman nota tandrat
yo me pṛṇād yo dadad yo nibodhāt
yo mā sunvantam upa gobhir āyat
yo naḥ sanutya uta vā jighatnuḥ
hatvī teṣām ā bharā no vasūni
taṃ vaḥ śardhaṃ mārutaṃ sumnayur girā
pra yad vayo na paptan vasmanas pari
adha smā na ud avatā sajoṣasaḥ
stuṣe yad vāṃ pṛthivi navyasā vacaḥ
uta vaḥ śaṃsam uśijām iva śmasi
saptir na rathyo aha dhītim aśyāḥ

mahaḥ pitur janitur jāmi tan naḥ
saṃgṛbhyā na ā bharā bhūri paśvaḥ

mahat tad vaḥ kavayaś cāru nāma

pratika: mahad vi jajñe akṣaraṃ pade goḥ
mo ṣū ṇo atra juhuranta devāḥ

śyāvī ca yad aruṣī ca svasārau
mātā ca yatra duhitā ca dhenū
kayā bhuvā ni dadhe dhenur ūdhaḥ
so anyasmin yūthe ni dadhāti retaḥ
sa hi kṣapāvān sa bhagaḥ sa rājā
pra nu vocāma vidur asya devāḥ
na tā minanti māyino na dhīrāḥ
dive-diva ā suva trir no ahnaḥ
āpaś cid asya rodasī cid urvī
trir ā divo vidathe santu devāḥ

ṛtena ṛtaṃ niyatam īḍa ā goḥ

pratika: iha tvā bhūry ā cared upa tman

mā nindata ya imāṃ mahyaṃ rātim
agnir mahyaṃ pred u vocan manīṣām
tam in nv eva samanā samānam
yad usriyāṇām apa vār iva vran
idam u tyan mahi mahām anīkam
mātuṣ pade parame anti ṣad goḥ
tvam asya kṣayasi yad dha viśvam
divi yad u draviṇaṃ yat pṛthivyām
kiṃ no asya draviṇaṃ kad dha ratnam
kā maryādā vayunā kad dha vāmam
adhā te agne kim iha vadanti
ūrdhva ū ṣu ṇo adhvarasya hotaḥ

pratika: tvaṃ hi viśvam abhy asi manma

na dhvasmānas tanvī (TS. tanuvi) repa ā dhuḥ
ye ha tye te sahamānā ayāsaḥ

sthirā cid annā dayate vi jambhaiḥ

svar (SV. svā3r; TS. suvar) ṇa (TS. na) jyotiḥ
pra te divo na stanayanti śuṣmāḥ (MS. stanayanta śuṣmaiḥ)

full_citation: RV.4.12.6a; 10.126.8a; AVP.5.39.8a; TS.4.7.15.7a; MS.3.16.5a: 192.9; KS.2.15a; ApŚ.6.22.1a. Ps: yathā ha tad vasavo gauryam HG.1.8.3; yathā ha tyad vasavaḥ KS.9.19; ŚŚ.1.15.5; 8.8.9; yathā ha tyat (ApŚ. tat) MS.4.11.1: 161.11; ApŚ.9.12.10

pratika: mahi jyotī rurucur yad dha vastoḥ
ataś cid asya mahimā vi reci
sa no netā vājam ā darṣi bhūrim
vi vāṃ cikitsad ṛtacid dha nārī
atkaṃ na puro jarimā vi dardaḥ
vi yat te cety amṛtasya varpaḥ
tam id va indraṃ suhavaṃ huvema
adha smā nas tanvo bodhi gopāḥ
dyāvo na dyumnair abhi santo aryaḥ
nū cid yathā naḥ sakhyā viyoṣat
tvaṃ mahāṃ (MS.MŚ. mahaṃ) indra tubhyaṃ ha kṣāḥ
full_citation: RV.4.17.1a; MS.4.11.4a: 171.3; KS.6.10a; AB.5.19.1; KB.26.12; AŚ.3.8.1. Ps: tvaṃ mahāṃ indra tubhyaṃ ha ŚŚ.10.10.6; 12.3.20; tvaṃ mahāṃ indra tubhyam AŚ.8.7.23; tvaṃ mahāṃ (MŚ. mahaṃ) indra KS.21.13; MŚ.5.1.7.13

pratika: ya eka ic cyāvayati pra bhūma
ayaṃ śṛṇve adha jayann uta ghnan
ayam uta pra kṛṇute yudhā gāḥ
sam indro gā ajayat saṃ hiraṇyā
sam aśviyā maghavā yo ha pūrvīḥ
kiyat svid indro adhy eti mātuḥ
vayaṃ hy ā te cakṛmā sabādhaḥ
stuta indro maghavā yad dha vṛtrā
na nānu gāny anu nū gamāni
kiṃ sa ṛdhak kṛṇavad yaṃ sahasram
etā vi pṛcha kim idaṃ bhananti
kim u ṣvid asmai nivido bhananta
kas te devo adhi mārḍīka āsīt
adhā me śyeno madhv ā jabhāra
abhi pra dadrur janayo na garbham
rathā iva pra yayuḥ sākam adrayaḥ
nir bhūd ukhachit sam aranta parva
ā na indro durād ā na āsāt
full_citation: RV.4.20.1a; VS.20.48a; AB.4.30.1; KB.22.1; AA.5.2.2.3; ŚŚ.12.3.9. Ps: ā na indro dūrāt ŚŚ.10.2.5; ā na indraḥ AŚ.7.5.18

na yasya vartā januṣā nv asti
yayā kṛṇoti muhu kā (read muhukā) cid ṛṣvaḥ
mā no mardhīr ā bharā daddhi tan naḥ
full_citation: RV.4.20.10a; TS.1.7.13.3a. P: mā no mardhīḥ TS.2.2.12.6

pratika: pra dāśuṣe dātave bhūri yat te

full_citation: RV.4.21.1a; VS.20.47a; AB.4.29.12; KB.22.1. Ps: ā yātv indro’vase AŚ.7.5.18; ŚŚ.10.2.4; ā yātv indraḥ KŚ.19.6.3; PG.2.16.4

pratika: ā yātv indro diva ā pṛthivyāḥ
kā te niṣattiḥ kim u no mamatsi
kiṃ nod ud u harṣase dātavā u
yan na indro jujuṣe yac ca vaṣṭi
tan no mahān karati śuṣmy ā cit
ā mātarā bharati śuṣmy ā goḥ
tā tū ta indra mahato mahāni
tā tū te satyā tuvinṛmṇa viśvā
atrāha te harivas tā u devīḥ
yat sīm anu pra muco badbadhānāḥ
asmākam it su śṛṇuhi tvam indra
kad asya citraṃ cikite kad ūtī
kadā nu te bhrātraṃ pra bravāma
svar ṇa citratamam iṣa ā goḥ
ṛṇā cid yatra ṛṇayā na ugraḥ

full_citation: RV.4.23.8a; AŚ.9.7.36; N.6.16; 10.41a. P: ṛtasya hi śurudhaḥ ŚŚ.14.16.10

pratika: tam in naro vi hvayante samīke
ād id dha nema indriyaṃ yajante
ād it somo vi papṛcyād asuṣvīn
dīrghaṃ yad ājim abhy akhyad aryaḥ
dīnā dakṣā vi duhanti pra vāṇam

full_citation: RV.4.25.1a; AB.6.19.10; GB.2.6.2. Ps: ko adya naryaḥ AŚ.7.12.1; ko adya Rvidh.2.13.3

pratika: ko bhrātraṃ vaṣṭi kavaye ka ūtī

nāsuṣver āpir na sakhā na jāmiḥ
pra su ṣa vibhyo maruto vir astu
garbhe nu sann anv eṣām avedam
na ghā sa mām apa joṣaṃ jabhāra
vi yad yadi vāta ūhuḥ puraṃdhim
sṛjad yad asmā ava ha kṣipaj jyām
ava yac chyeno asvanīd adha dyoḥ
tvā yujā tava tat soma sakhye
ā na (ŚŚ. naḥ) stuta upa vājebhir ūtī
tiraś cid aryaḥ savanā purūṇi (RV.8.66.12c, savanā vaso gahi)
ā hi ṣmā yāti naryaś cikitvān
juṣṭām anu pra diśaṃ (read pradiśaṃ) mandayadhyai

full_citation: RV.4.30.1a; AŚ.6.4.10; ŚŚ.18.13.2. Cf. BṛhD.4.133. See na ki indra

uta smā hi tvām āhur it

pratika: ād id devānām upa sakhyam āyan

satyam ūcur nara evā hi cakruḥ

ta ā takṣantv ṛbhavo rayiṃ naḥ
idāhnaḥ pītim uta vo madaṃ dhuḥ
ṛbhur vibhvā vāja indro no acha
idā hi vo dhiṣaṇā devy ahnām
adhāt pītiṃ saṃ madā agmatā vaḥ
ye aśvinā ye pitarā ya ūtī
ye aṃsatrā ya ṛdhag rodasī ye
asme dhatta ye ca rātiṃ gṛṇanti
sam indreṇa madatha (AVŚ. vasunā) saṃ marudbhiḥ

RV.4.36.1b; AB.5.2.10; KB.22.5. P: rathas tricakraḥ AA.1.5.3.6

pratika: dyām ṛbhavaḥ pṛthivīṃ yac ca puṣyatha
tāṃ ū nv asya savanasya pītaye
śruṣṭī vājā ṛbhavas tad va ukthyam
sa vājy arvā sa ṛṣir vacasyayā
sa rāyas poṣaṃ sa suvīryaṃ dadhe
yaṃ vājo vibhvāṃ ṛbhavo yam āviṣuḥ
śreṣṭhaṃ vaḥ peśo adhi dhāyi darśatam
ā no rayim ṛbhavas takṣatā vayaḥ
taṃ vājaṃ citram ṛbhavo dadā naḥ

śriye na gāva upa somam asthuḥ

uru vāṃ rathaḥ pari nakṣati dyām
ā yat samudrād abhi vartate vām
yat sīṃ vāṃ pṛkṣo bhurajanta pakvāḥ
sindhur ha vāṃ rasayā siñcad aśvān
tad ū ṣu vām ajiraṃ ceti yānam
ā no yātaṃ divo achā pṛthivyāḥ
mā vām anye ni yaman devayantaḥ
saṃ yad dade nābhiḥ pūrvyā vām
naro yad vām aśvinā stomam āvan

putro yas te sahasaḥ sūna ūhe

pratika: viśvaṃ sa dhatte draviṇaṃ yam invasi

ādatta vajram abhi yad ahiṃ han
tad dhi havyaṃ manuṣe gā avindat
nava yad asya navatiṃ ca bhogān
trī yac chatā mahiṣāṇām agho māḥ
taṃ cin naraḥ śaśamānā apa vran
katho nu te pari carāṇi vidvān
yā co nu navyā kṛṇavaḥ śaviṣṭha
pred u tā te vidatheṣu bravāma
yā cin nu vajrin kṛṇavo dadhṛṣvān
na te vartā taviṣyā asti tasyāḥ
kva sya vīraḥ ko apaśyad indram
apṛcham anyāṃ uta te ma āhuḥ
pra nu vayaṃ sute yā te kṛtāni
vi ṣū mṛdho januṣā dānam invan
yujaṃ hi mām akṛthā ād id indra
kiṃ mā karann abalā asya senāḥ
antar hy akhyad ubhe asya dhene
saṃ tā indro asṛjad asya śākaiḥ

pratika: mahāntam indra parvataṃ vi yad vaḥ

ime cid asya jrayaso nu devī

pratika: tiṣṭhā ratham (TB.ApŚ. rathe) adhi taṃ (VS.ŚB. yaṃ; TB. yad) vajrahasta (TB. °taḥ)

yo asmai ghraṃsa uta vā ya ūdhani
jināti ved amuyā hanti vā dhuniḥ
sam īṃ paṇer ajati bhojanaṃ muṣe
durge cana dhriyate viśva ā puru
ud īṃ gavyaṃ sṛjate satvabhir dhuniḥ

pratika: sa ā gamad indro yo vasūnām

āsya śravasyād ratha ā ca ghoṣāt
na sa rājā vyathate yasminn indraḥ

pratika: paro māyābhir ṛta āsa nāma te
atyaṃ haviḥ sacate sac ca dhātu
pra va ete suyujo yāmann iṣṭaye

ya u svayaṃ vahate so araṃ karat
ubhā sa varā praty eti bhāti ca
yo jāgāra tam u sāmāni yanti
yo jāgāra tam ayaṃ soma āha
agnir jāgāra tam u sāmāni yanti
agnir jāgāra tam ayaṃ soma āha
vi sūryo amatiṃ na śriyaṃ sāt

asmabhyaṃ tad dhattana yad va īmahe

na sa jīyate maruto na hanyate
na sredhati na vyathate na riṣyati
ṛṣiṃ vā yaṃ rājānaṃ vā suṣūdatha
na yo yuchati tiṣyo yathā divaḥ

na parvatā na nadyo varanta vaḥ

yad udyate vasavo yac ca śasyate
asmabhyaṃ śarma bahulaṃ vi yanta (RV.5.55.9b, yantana)

ni vo vanā jihate yāmano bhiyā
saha (MS. sahā) ojo bāhvor vo balaṃ hitam

kas kāvyā marutaḥ ko ha pauṃsyā
yūyaṃ ha bhūmiṃ kiraṇaṃ na rejatha

pratika: agnir no vanate (VSK. vanute; SV.TS.KS. vaṃsate) rayim
agne yukṣvā (SV.JB.PB. yuṅkṣvā) hi ye tava

sa īṃ pāhi ya ṛjīṣī tarutraḥ (VaradapU. tarudraḥ)
sa indra citrāṃ abhi tṛndhi vājān
jahi śatrūṃr abhi gā indra tṛndhi
te tvā madā bṛhad indra svadhāvaḥ
mahām adriṃ pari gā indra santam
paprātha kṣāṃ mahi daṃso vy urvīm
upa dyām ṛṣvo bṛhad indra stabhāyaḥ
adha tvā viśve pura indra devāḥ
adha dyauś cit te apa sā nu vajrāt
adha tvaṣṭā te maha ugra vajram
sa no vājāya śravasa iṣe ca
divi ca smaidhi pārye na indra
tvaṃ ha nu tyad adamāyo dasyūn
asti svin me vīryaṃ tat ta indra
na svid asti tad ṛtuthā vi vocaḥ
sad id dhi te tuvijātasya manye
tan naḥ pratnaṃ sakhyam astu yuṣme
ṛṇoḥ puro vi duro asya viśvāḥ
sa hi dhībhir havyo asti ugraḥ
sa yo na muhe na mithū jano bhūt
agnir na śuṣkaṃ vanam indra hetiḥ
rakṣo ni dhakṣy aśanir na bhīmā
yāhi sūno sahaso yasya nū cit
pra tat te adyā karaṇaṃ kṛtaṃ bhūt

ko arka indra katamaḥ sa hotā
yād eva vidma tāt tvā mahāntam

nū ma ā vācam upa yāhi vidvān
indraṃ taṃ gīrbhir abhy arca ābhiḥ
tam u naḥ pūrve pitaro navagvāḥ
tan no vi voco yadi te purā cit
kas te bhāgaḥ kiṃ vayo dudhra khidvaḥ
indraṃ vepī vakvarī yasya nū gīḥ

tat parvatas tat savitā cano dhāt
spṛdho adevīr abhi ca kramāma (read abhi cakramāma)
yad īm arbhe mahati vā hitāsaḥ
śrutvā havaṃ maruto yad dha yātha
śravad id dhavam upa ca stavānaḥ
uta tvaṃ sūno sahaso no adya
syām ahaṃ te sadam id rātau
uta tyā me havam ā jagmyātam
uta sya devaḥ savitā bhago naḥ
tvaṣṭā devebhir janibhiḥ sajoṣāḥ (RV.10.64.10b, pitā vacaḥ)
stutā mantrāḥ kaviśastā avantu (MS. avantu naḥ)
ud u tyac cakṣur mahi mitrayor ā
rukmo na diva uditā vy adyaut
devānāṃ janma sanutar ā ca vipraḥ
stuṣa u vo maha ṛtasya gopān
yūyaṃ hi ṣṭhā rathyo nas tanūnām

full_citation: RV.6.51.7a. See mā vayam eno, and cf. mā vo bhujemā°

pratika: mā tat karma vasavo yac cayadhve
nama id ugraṃ nama ā vivāse
viśvān va ā name maho yajatrāḥ
te hi śreṣṭhavarcasas ta u naḥ
te na indraḥ pṛthivī kṣāma vardhan
jahī ny atriṇaṃ paṇiṃ vṛko hi ṣaḥ
kartā no adhvann ā sugaṃ gopā amā
na tad divā na pṛthivyānu manye
ati vā yo maruto manyate naḥ
brahma vā yaḥ kriyamāṇaṃ ninitsāt (AVŚ.AVP. vā yo nindiṣat kriyamāṇam)
kim aṅga tvā brahmaṇaḥ soma gopām

pratika: yā sadya usrā vyuṣi jmo antān

stutaś ca vāṃ mādhvī suṣṭutiś ca
rasāś ca ye vām anu rātim agman

pratika: ut te śocir bhānavo dyām apaptan

ni ṣma māvate vahathā purā cit
vapur nu tac cikituṣe cid astu

nāsya vartā na tarutā nv asti
sa vrajaṃ dartā pārye adha dyoḥ
iyaṃ mad vāṃ pra stṛṇīte manīṣā
saṃ yāv apnastho (MS. yā apnaḥstho) apaseva janān
pari yad bhūtho rodasī cid urvī
tā hi kṣatraṃ dhārayethe anu dyūn
ā yad vāṃ satyo aratir ṛte bhūt
na ye devāsa ohasā na martāḥ

pratika: tam agnim aste vasavo ny ṛṇvan
dā no agne dhiyā rayiṃ suvīram
ā yas te agna idhate anīkam
uto na ebhi stavathair iha syāḥ
vi ye te agne bhejire anīkam
uto na ebhiḥ sumanā iha syāḥ
mā śūne agne ni ṣadāma nṛṇām
sed agnir agnīṃr aty astv (TB. ety) anyān
yam īśānaḥ sam id indhe haviṣmān
prati na īṃ surabhīṇi vyantu (TS. viyantu)
mā no dame mā vana ā juhūrthāḥ
nū me brahmāṇy agna uc chaśādhi
mā tve sacā tanaye nitya ā dhak
mā vīro asman naryo vi dāsīt
mā te asmān durmatayo bhṛmāc cit

pratika: adha sma (MS. smā) te vrajanaṃ kṛṣṇam asti (MS. kṛṣṇam astu; KS. °nam astu kṛṣṇam)
achā dyām aruṣo dhūma eti (JB. eṣi)
saṃ dūto agna īyase hi devān
vi yasya te pṛthivyāṃ pājo aśret
tam id doṣā tam uṣasi yaviṣṭham
vi yad rukmo na rocasa upāke
divo na te tanyatur eti śuṣmaḥ
citro na sūraḥ prati cakṣi bhānum
yā vā te santi dāśuṣe adhṛṣṭāḥ
tābhir naḥ sūno sahaso ni pāhi
nir yat pūteva svadhitiḥ śucir gāt
sa gṛtso agnis taruṇaś cid astu
saṃ yo vanā yuvate bhasmanā datā (RV.7.4.2c, yuvate śucidan)
bhūri cid annā sam id atti sadyaḥ
marteṣv (VS.MS.KS. martyeṣv) agnir amṛto ni dhāyi
sa mā no atra juhuraḥ sahasvaḥ
tam oṣadhīś ca vaninaś ca garbham
adhā cid okaḥ punar it sa eti
ā no vājy abhīṣāḍ etu navyaḥ

full_citation: RV.7.5.1a. P: prāgnaye Rvidh.2.25.2. Cf. BṛhD.5.161

pratika: sa mānuṣīr abhi viśo vi bhāti
vāyur na pāthaḥ pari pāsi sadyaḥ
pra samrājo (SV. samrājam) asurasya praśastim (SV. praśastam)
full_citation: RV.7.6.1a; SV.1.78a; KB.22.9. P: pra samrājaḥ ŚŚ.10.5.24. Cf. BṛhD.5.161

pratika: vande dāruṃ (read vandārur, or vandārvā) vandamāno vivakmi
sa nirudhyā nahuṣo (TB. nahṛṣo) yahvo agniḥ
pra vo devaṃ cit sahasānam agnim
ā yāhy agne pathyā anu svāḥ
ā ye me asya dīdhayann ṛtasya
kayā no agne vi vasaḥ suvṛktim
full_citation: RV.7.8.3a. P: kayā no agne vi vasaḥ ŚŚ.3.5.3

pratika: vi yat sūryo na rocate bṛhad bhāḥ
mā naḥ kṣudhe mā rakṣasa ṛtāvaḥ
sa sukratur yo vi duraḥ paṇīnām
agne yāhi dūtyaṃ mā riṣaṇyaḥ (TB. dūtyaṃ vāriṣeṇyaḥ)
uṣo na jāraḥ pṛthu pājo aśret
vṛṣā hariḥ śucir ā bhāti bhāsā
agnir janmāni deva ā vi vidvān

full_citation: RV.7.11.2a; TB.3.6.8.2a; AŚ.9.9.7. Cf. śaśvattamam īḍate

pratika: triś cid aktoḥ pra cikitur vasūni
yo dīdāya samiddhaḥ (JB. samiddha) sve duroṇe
citrabhānuṃ (TB.ApŚ. citrabhānū) rodasī antar urvī (JB. ūrvī, one ms. urvī)

RV.7.12.3a; SV.2.656a; JB.3.243; PB.15.2.4; TB.3.5.2.3a; 6.1.3a. Ps: tvaṃ varuṇa uta mitraḥ JG.1.13; tvaṃ varuṇaḥ ApŚ.21.2.4; 24.11.15

pratika: jāto yad agne bhuvanā vy akhyaḥ

pratika: ā na ṛte śiśīhi viśvam ṛtvijam
agne rayiṃ maghavadbhyo na ā vaha
ud vā siñcadhvam upa vā pṛṇadhvam

full_citation: RV.7.17.1a; AŚ.8.2.3. P: agne bhava suṣamidhā ŚŚ.12.11.4

pratika: tvām u te dadhire (MŚ. adds devayanto) havyavāham
maho no ratnā vi dadha iyānaḥ
tve ha yat pitaraś cin na indra
tve gāvaḥ sudughās tve hy aśvāḥ
ava dyubhir abhi viduṣ kaviḥ san
tvām in me gopatiṃ viśva āha
ā na indraḥ sumatiṃ gantv acha
ekaṃ ca yo viṃśatiṃ ca śravasyā
dasmo na sadman ni śiśāti barhiḥ
ādhreṇa cit tad v ekaṃ cakāra
tigmaṃ tasmin ni jahi vajram indra
na ta indra sumatayo na rāyaḥ

full_citation: RV.7.18.22a. P: dve naptuḥ ŚŚ.16.11.15. Cf. BṛhD.5.162

pratika: yaḥ (AVŚ. erroneously, pra) śaśvato adāśuṣo gayasya
tvaṃ ha tyad indra kutsam āvaḥ
dāsaṃ yac chuṣṇaṃ kuyavaṃ ny asmai
tvaṃ nṛbhir nṛmaṇo devavītau (TB. nṛpate devahūtau)
tvaṃ ni dasyuṃ cumuriṃ dhuniṃ ca
nava yat puro navatiṃ ca sadyaḥ
full_citation: RV.7.19.5b; AVŚ.20.37.5b. Cf. next but one

pratika: ahañ (AVŚ. ahaṃ) ca vṛtraṃ namucim utāhan
sadyaś cin nu te maghavann abhiṣṭau
ye te havebhir vi paṇīṃr adāśan
upa no vājān mimīhy upa stīn
trātā na indra enaso mahaś cit
kartā sudāse aha vā u lokam
dātā vasu muhur ā dāśuṣe bhūt
tam u cin nārī naryaṃ sasūva
pra yaḥ senānīr adha nṛbhyo asti
nū cit sa bhreṣate jano na reṣan
ā citra citryaṃ bharā rayiṃ naḥ
yas ta indra priyo jano dadāśat
tvam aṅga śakra vasva ā śako naḥ
sa na indra tvayatāyā iṣe dhāḥ
vasvī ṣu te jaritre astu śaktiḥ
bodhāmasi tvā haryaśva yajñaiḥ (MŚ. mss. yajñe)
ny u bhriyante yaśaso gṛbhād ā
mā śiśnadevā api gur ṛtaṃ naḥ
na śatrur antaṃ vividad yudhā te
kīriś cid dhi tvām avase juhāva
pibā somam indra mandatu (Svidh., erroneously, mandantu) tvā
yas te mado yujyaś cārur asti
bodhā su me maghavan vācam emām
na te giro api mṛṣye turasya

full_citation: RV.7.22.7a; AVŚ.20.73.1a; Vait.32.7. P: tubhyed imā ŚŚ.10.5.19

pratika: nū cin nu te manyamānasya dasma
na vīryam indra te na rādhaḥ
ye ca pūrva ṛṣayo ye ca nūtnāḥ
ā yo viśvāni śavasā (SV. śravasā) tatāna
āpaś cit pipyu staryo na gāvaḥ
tvaṃ hi dhībhir dayase vi vājān
tam ā nṛbhiḥ puruhūta pra yāhi
aso yathā no’vitā vṛdhe ca (SV. vṛdhaś cit)
ā no diva ā pṛthivyā ṛjīṣin
divīva dyām adhi naḥ śromataṃ dhāḥ
mā te mano viṣvadryag (TS. °driyag) vi cārīt
asme dyumnam adhi ratnaṃ ca dhehi
yad īṃ sabādhaḥ pitaraṃ na putrāḥ
ni māmṛje pura indraḥ su sarvāḥ
evā tam āhur uta śṛṇva indraḥ
śūro nṛṣātā śavasaś (SV.MS. śravasaś) cakānaḥ (SV. ca kāme)
ā gomati vraje bhajā tvaṃ naḥ
ya indra śuṣmo maghavan te asti
apā vṛdhi parivṛtaṃ (TB. parivṛttiṃ; comm. parivṛtiṃ) na rādhaḥ
adhi kṣami viṣurūpaṃ (ArS. kṣamā viśva°) yad asti (ArS. asya; MS. āsta)
nū cin na indro maghavā sahūtī
dāno vājaṃ ni yamate na ūtī
nū indra rāye varivas kṛdhī naḥ
viśve cid dhi tvā vihavanta martāḥ
havaṃ ta indra mahimā vy ānaṭ
ā yad vajraṃ dadhiṣe hasta ugra
saṃ yan nṝn na rodasī ninetha
ava dvitā varuṇo māyī naḥ sāt
maho rāyo rādhaso yad dadan naḥ

full_citation: RV.7.29.1a; 9.88.1a; SV.2.821a; KB.26.11. Ps: ayaṃ soma indra tubhyaṃ sunva ā tu (RV.7.29.1) AB.5.20.8; AŚ.8.11.1; ayaṃ somaḥ ŚŚ.10.10.4; LŚ.4.7.1
RV.7.29.1a; 9.88.1a; SV.2.821a; KB.26.11. Ps: ayaṃ soma indra tubhyaṃ sunva ā tu (RV.7.29.1) AB.5.20.8; AŚ.8.11.1; ayaṃ somaḥ ŚŚ.10.10.4; LŚ.4.7.1

pratika: ā tu pra yāhi harivas tadokāḥ
uto ghā te puruṣyā id āsan
ā no deva śavasā yāhi śuṣmin
ny agniḥ sīdad asuro na hotā
pra vo mahe mahivṛdhe (SV.JB.PB. mahevṛdhe) bharadhvam
ārāttāc cit sadhamādaṃ na ā gahi
ime hi te brahmakṛtaḥ sute sacā
sadyaś cid yaḥ sahasrāṇi śatā dadat
ya indro harivān na dabhanti taṃ ripaḥ
śraddhā it te maghavan pārye divi
nahi tvad anyan maghavan na āpyam
ā va indraṃ puruhūtaṃ name girā

full_citation: RV.7.34.1b; MS.4.9.14b: 134.11; TA.4.17.1b. See asmad rathaḥ

pratika: śam indrāsomā suvitāya (AVP. savitāya) śaṃ yoḥ
śaṃ no bhagaḥ śam u naḥ śaṃso astu

śaṃ naḥ satyasya suyamasya (AVP. sūya°) śaṃsaḥ
śaṃ no dhātā śam u dhartā no astu
śaṃ rodasī bṛhatī śaṃ no adriḥ

full_citation: RV.7.35.5a; AVŚ.19.10.5a; AVP.12.16.5a. Cf. anu dyāvā°

pratika: śaṃ no rajasas (AVP. rajasaḥ) patir astu jiṣṇuḥ
śaṃ na indro vasubhir devo astu
śaṃ nas tvaṣṭā gnābhir iha śṛṇotu
śaṃ naḥ somo bhavatu brahma śaṃ naḥ
śaṃ no grāvāṇaḥ śam u santu yajñāḥ
śaṃ naḥ prasvaḥ śam v astu vediḥ
śaṃ naḥ sūrya urucakṣā ud etu

full_citation: RV.7.35.8b. See under śaṃ te catasraḥ

pratika: śaṃ naḥ sindhavaḥ śam u santv āpaḥ

śaṃ no bhavitraṃ śam v astu vāyuḥ
śaṃ naḥ kṣetrasya patir astu śaṃbhuḥ
śaṃ (AVP., erroneously, saṃ) sarasvatī saha dhībhir astu
śaṃ no divyāḥ pārthivāḥ śaṃ no apyāḥ
śaṃ no arvantaḥ śam u santu gāvaḥ
śaṃ no aja ekapād devo astu
śaṃ no apāṃ napāt perur astu

pratika: girā ya etā yunajad dharī te
mā naḥ pari khyad akṣarā carantī

kadā na indra rāya ā daśasyeḥ
pṛkṣo no arvā ny uhīta vājī
abhi yaṃ devī nirṛtiś cid īśe
ud u ṣya devaḥ savitā yayāma
ud u tiṣṭha savitaḥ śrudhy asya
yam ā cid viśve vasavo gṛṇanti
sa na stomān namasyaś cano dhāt
mitras tan no varuṇo rodasī ca
vāyuś ca yan niyuvaite bhagaś ca
sed ugro astu marutaḥ sa śuṣmī
te no aṃho ati parṣann ariṣṭān
prātaḥ somam uta rudraṃ huvema (AVŚ. havāmahe)
ādhraś cid yaṃ manyamānas turaś cit
rājā cid yaṃ bhagaṃ bhakṣīty (VārG. bhakṣīmahīty) āha

uta tyad vāṃ jurate aśvinā bhūt
nir īṃ parṣad arāvā yo yuvākuḥ
pari ghraṃsam omanā vāṃ (TB. parighraṃsa vāṃ manā vāṃ) vayo gāt (TB. gām)
yo ha sya vāṃ rathirā vasta usrāḥ
tena naḥ śaṃ yor uṣaso vyuṣṭau
pra tat sthānam avāci vāṃ pṛthivyām
ā yat sedathur dhruvase no yonim

ny u priyo manuṣaḥ sādi hotā

pratika: ni śaryāṇi dadhate deva ā varam
vi yo mame yamyā saṃyatī madaḥ
yūnā ha santā prathamaṃ vi jajñatuḥ
nṛbhir yato vājam ā darṣi sātaye
ayaṃ diva iyarti viśvam ā rajaḥ
vatso na mātur upa sarjy ūdhani
iṣur na dhanvan prati dhīyate matiḥ
ukṣā mimāti (SV. mimeti) prati yanti dhenavaḥ
atkaṃ na niktaṃ pari somo avyata
nendrād ṛte pavate dhāma kiṃ cana
yūyaṃ hi soma pitaro mama sthana
rathā iva pra yayuḥ sātim acha
trir asmai sapta dhenavo duduhre (SV.Svidh. duduhrire)
ā yoniṃ somaḥ sukṛtaṃ ni ṣīdati
hito na saptir abhi vājam arṣa
nāvā na sindhum ati parṣi vidvān
śūro na yudhyann ava no nida spaḥ
asuryaṃ varṇaṃ ni riṇīte asya tam
sam ī rathaṃ na bhurijor aheṣata
śyeno na yoniṃ sadanaṃ dhiyā kṛtam
aśvo na devāṃ apy eti yajñiyaḥ
rebho na pūrvīr uṣaso vi rājati
śucir dhiyā pavate soma indra te
āprāḥ kratūn sam ajair adhvare matīḥ
ver na druṣac camvor āsadad dhariḥ
sam ī gāvo matayo yanti saṃyataḥ
sa tū pavasva pari pārthivaṃ rajaḥ
mā no nir bhāg vasunaḥ sādanaspṛśaḥ
ā tū na indo śatadātv aśvyam

pratika: sa pūrvyaḥ pavate yaṃ divas pari

pūrvīr hi te srutayaḥ santi yātave
jahi śatrum antike dūrake ca yaḥ
urvīṃ gavyūtim abhayaṃ ca nas kṛdhi
vi ca naśan na iṣo arātayaḥ
aryo naśanta saniṣanta (SV. naḥ santu saniṣantu) no dhiyaḥ
uta svasyā arātyā arir hi ṣaḥ
dhanvan na tṛṣṇā sam arīta tāṃ abhi

ā naḥ soma pavamānaḥ kirā vasu
śikṣā vayodho vasave su cetunā (read sucetunā ?)

punāno vāraṃ pary ety (SV.JB. vāram aty eṣy) avyayam
śyeno na yoniṃ ghṛtavantam āsadam (SV.JB. āsadat)
atyo na mṛṣṭo (JB. nikto) abhi vājam arṣasi
apasedhan (SV.JB. °dhaṃ) duritā soma mṛḍaya (SV.JB. no mṛḍa)

antar vāṇīṣu pra carā su jīvase

eṣa sya te madhumāṃ indra somaḥ
gā gavyann abhi śūro na satvā
uta sma rāśiṃ pari yāsi gonām

indro na yo mahā karmāṇi cakriḥ

sā te jīvātur uta tasya viddhi

nṛvad vadann upa no māhi vājān

kas te mada indra rantyo bhūt
duro giro abhy ugro vi dhāva
kad vāho arvāg upa mā manīṣā
ā tvā śakyām upamaṃ rādho annaiḥ

kayā dhiyā karase kan na āgan

yo no dāsa āryo vā puruṣṭuta
yo dabhrebhir havyo yaś ca bhūribhiḥ
taṃ vikhāde sasnim adya śrutaṃ naram
svavṛjaṃ hi tvām aham indra śuśrava

pratika: purāṇā vāṃ vīryā pra bravā jane

ayaṃ nāsatyā śrad arir yathā dadhat
iyaṃ vām ahve śṛṇutaṃ me aśvinā
yuvaṃ ha rebhaṃ vṛṣaṇā guhā hitam
na taṃ rājānāv adite kutaś cana
rathaṃ yaṃ vām ṛbhavaś cakrur aśvinā
tā vartir yātaṃ jayuṣā vi parvatam
rathaṃ yāntaṃ kuha ko ha vāṃ narā
kuha svid doṣā kuha vastor aśvinā
maryaṃ na yoṣā kṛṇute sadhastha ā
kasya dhvasrā bhavathaḥ kasya vā narā
yuvāṃ ha ghoṣā pary aśvinā yatī
rājña ūce duhitā pṛche vāṃ narā
bhūtaṃ me ahna uta bhūtam aktave
yuvaṃ kavī ṣṭhaḥ pary aśvinā ratham
yuvor ha makṣā pary aśvinā madhu
yuvaṃ ha bhujyuṃ yuvam aśvinā vaśam

so cin nu sakhyā narya ina stutaḥ

vītaṃ me yajñam ā gataṃ me annam
punas tad ā vṛhati yat kanāyāḥ
sa īṃ vṛṣā na phenam asyad ājau
na tā nu me pṛśanyo jagṛbhre
agniṃ na nagna upa sīdad ūdhaḥ

iyaṃ me nābhir iha me sadhastham
